title: berkheya setifera
intro: Berkheya setifera, also known as the African daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Berkheya setifera include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Berkheya setifera include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
